«sig003:Tables»
«sig007:Tables now allow column & row spanning between»
«sig007:cells. This is included in some updated snippets, but a»
«sig007:simplified example is given below.»
«sig007:A cell can be spanned across columns by grouping»
«sig007:multiple pipe »«sig010:|»«sig007:  characters at the end of a cell.»
«sig007:Row spanning is achieved by adding a »«sig010:^»«sig007:  at the end»
«sig007:of a cell just before the »«sig010:|»«sig007: .»
«sig007:These can be combined to span a cell across both»
«sig007:columns and rows. Cells must have the same colspan if»
«sig007:they are to be rowspan’d.»
«sig007:Note: For gmkit, markdown syntax does not support»
«sig007:converting spanned cells in tables, so a simple table is»
«sig007:shown in the example.»

«sig002:Images»
«sig007:Images must be hosted online somewhere, like Imgur.»
«sig007:You use the address to that image to reference it in your»
«sig007:brew*.»
«sig007:Using Curly Injection you can assign an id, classes, or»
«sig007:inline CSS properties to the Markdown image syntax.»
«sig007:* When using Imgur-hosted images, use the “direct»
«sig007:link”, which can be found when you click into your»
«sig007:image in the Imgur interface.»
